title: Verify self-contained offline operation
preconditions: All INSIGHTS workflows can run under network isolation with process and socket inspection.
steps: Run discovery, report, retention, restatement, history, deletion, policy validation, recovery, failure, cancellation, and restart workflows while blocking network and tracking processes, listeners, children, and cleanup.
expected: All accepted workflows complete without network, daemon, watcher, scheduler, service, listener, queue, cloud model, or lingering background process.
